calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Chip Cox, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Navigators Specialty Insurance Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Ron Blackburn d/b/a R&R Custom Builders.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $0
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $1304.71
Total Judgment in the amount of $1304.71
Judgement is awarded in favor of plaintiff Navigators Specialty Insurance Company ("Navigators") and against defendant Ron Blackburn d/b/a R&R Custom Builders ("Blackburn") with this judicial declaration that Navigators has no duty to defend Blackburn against the claims asserted against Blackburn in Jones v. Castillero Design and Construction, Inc, San Diego County Superior Court Case No. 37-2014-00015572-CU-CO-CTL (the "Jones Lawsuit"); and with this judicial declaration that Navigators has no duty to indemnify Blackburn for any settlement or judgment in the Jones Lawsuit.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2017 Continued To Nov-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
